items.title: Decision Intelligence Market to Reach USD 74.23 Billion by 2033, Owing to Rising Adoption of AI-Enabled Data-Driven Decision-Making | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The decision intelligence market is projected to grow from $18.08 billion in 2025 to $74.23 billion by 2033, driven by increasing AI and machine learning adoption, cloud-based solutions, and demand for real-time strategic insights across industries.

items.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai Predicts AI Will Act For You — From Investments To Medical Advice — Calling The Coming Shift 'Really Interesting'
items.description: A coming wave of artificial intelligence tools may soon make decisions on behalf of users, from guiding investment choices to reviewing medical treatments. That shift is advancing quickly enough that it could act as an agent for users within the next year, Google CEO Sundar Pichai recently told BBC. CEOs Debate How Far AI Will Go Pichai said AI is advancing fast, and may eventually perform duties now handled by corporate leaders. items.title: Rubrik’s Massive Rebound: Why the Next Leg Higher Could Be Fast
items.description: Rubrik is on track to rally higher and potentially reach new highs before 2025's end. Analysts and institutions are accumulating and driving the action.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (Dec 1-5): Trump Says He's Back in Elon Musk's Social Circle, U.S. Suspends China MSS Sanctions & More
items.description: Trump claims he has restored ties with Elon Musk, signaling a thaw in their relationship after earlier conflicts, sparking attention in the tech and political world. Conservative advocacy groups, including Steve Bannon, urge Trump administration to stop Big Tech from using copyrighted content for AI training without permission.
